hotspots.title: Trump’s WHCD evacuation after shooting
hotspots.blurb: A shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner led to President Trump's evacuation, sparking intense media coverage and political reactions. The event has raised concerns about security and political violence.
hotspots.affect: This event commands disproportionate attention due to its high-profile nature, security implications, and the charged political atmosphere surrounding Trump.

refs.title: Cuneo Granda Volley ringrazia Jessica Rivero: la schiacciatrice saluta le Gatte

hotspots.title: Meloni’s labor decree and Minetti pardon scandal
hotspots.blurb: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni's government faces backlash over a controversial labor decree and the pardon of Nicole Minetti, a figure linked to a past scandal. The pardon has sparked debates about judicial independence and political interference.
hotspots.affect: The scandal carries high affective investment due to its moral charge, polarized contention, and implications for judicial integrity and political accountability.

refs.title: Il ministero dai mille problemi: così la giustizia mette a rischio Meloni

Grazia a Minetti, nuovi dubbi sull’iter: verifiche fino in Uruguay

hotspots.title: PP-Vox ‘national priority’ pacts in Spain
hotspots.blurb: The conservative People's Party (PP) and far-right Vox have formed regional pacts prioritizing Spanish nationals in public services, sparking debates about immigration, social cohesion, and constitutional legality.
hotspots.affect: These pacts command attention due to their divisive nature, moral charge, and potential to reshape regional governance and social policies.

refs.title: VOX cuestiona el bloqueo de iniciativas sobre prioridad nacional en la Asamblea de Murcia

El PP de Palma aprobará una proposición de Vox sobre "prioridad nacional" si acepta algunos cambios
Vox avisa al PP que no permitirá que 'diluya con retórica' la prioridad nacional
El Govern acusa a PP y Vox de propiciar un "apartheid" al apostar por la "prioridad nacional"

hotspots.title: AfD’s rise and democratic backlash in Germany
hotspots.blurb: Germany's far-right Alternative for Germany (AfD) continues to gain traction in polls, sparking debates about democratic resilience, extremism, and the political mainstream's response to populist movements.
hotspots.affect: The AfD's rise commands attention due to its implications for democratic norms, polarized contention, and the broader European political landscape.

hotspots.title: Magyar’s victory and Fidesz’s post-Orbán reshuffle
hotspots.blurb: Hungary's opposition leader Péter Magyar's electoral victory over Viktor Orbán's Fidesz party has triggered a political reshuffle, with debates about democratic renewal, corruption, and Hungary's future direction.
hotspots.affect: This political shift commands attention due to its historic nature, moral charge, and implications for Hungary's democratic institutions and EU relations.
